LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED, AS FOLLOWS: $687,559.10 WHICH IS THE ARBITRATION AMOUNT, $10,500.53 FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES AWARDED BY THE ARBITRATOR; INTEREST OF $79,653.60 FROM MARCH 16, 2010 THROUGH MARCH 25, 2013 AT $72.15 PER DAY; AND ATTORNEY FEES OF $821.50 INCURRED IN BRINGING THIS PETITION. THE REQUEST FOR COSTS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE; THERE WAS NO EVIDENCE OF COSTS SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT KARTOON, DERON A. OEX HEARING SET FOR JUL-24-2013 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 No Appearance; Order To Arrest

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jul-24-2013 Continued For Letter To Aug-21-13 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Steve Mains, Esq. of Mains & Bloom, Tel. 415.459.1841, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONER WELLS FARGO ADVISORS LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is confirmed, as follows: $687,559.10 which is the Arbitration amount, $10,500.53 for attorneys' fees awarded by the arbitrator; interest of $79,653.60 from March 16, 2010 through March 25, 2013 at $72.15 per day; and attorney fees of $821.50 incurred in bringing this Petition. The request for costs is denied without prejudice; there was no evidence of costs submitted with the moving papers. No opposition was filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
